explicit_text: I was born in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, in 1964. It was the place where my early life began before my family moved to San Juan, Puerto Rico when I was just two years old. Although I left Santo Domingo at a young age, it remains the starting point of my life's journey.

explicit_text: The Dominican Republic is where I was born, specifically in Santo Domingo. I left the country with my family in 1966 when I was two years old, moving to San Juan, Puerto Rico. explicit_text: My family moved to San Juan, Puerto Rico in 1966 when I was two years old. I went to school and attended college there, which shaped much of my early education and personal development. San Juan was the place I called home until I moved to the continental United States in 1987.

explicit_text: I moved to the United States in 1987, arriving in Sioux City, Iowa, seeking a better future. The US gave me the opportunity to become independent and pursue my dreams, even without a college degree. Over the years, I worked various jobs, built relationships, and eventually settled into a career and life that I am proud of.

explicit_text: I arrived in Sioux City, Iowa in August 1987 and lived there for nine years. During that time, I worked four years in a meat packing plant and another four years at Gateway 2000 Inc., a computer manufacturing company. Sioux City was where I started my life in the United States and began building my career.

explicit_text: My adult daughter Tiffany currently lives in Omaha, Nebraska. She was born in 1989 and grew up with her mom and siblings in various places around the Midwest. Omaha is where Tiffany has settled as an adult, which keeps me connected to the Midwest through her.

explicit_text: In 1996, I moved to Minneapolis, Minnesota, where I met my second wife, Ikuko. I worked for Micron PC for four years while living in the Twin Cities. Minneapolis is also where I met my girlfriend Gail in 2006 at a martial arts studio, which led me to discover Krav Maga and start teaching it.

explicit_text: I have been working at CenturyLink, formerly known as Qwest Communications, for almost fourteen years now. Although it’s not exactly the job of my dreams, I have been happy with it and it has provided stability. This role represents my longest tenure at a single company in the US.

explicit_text: Krav Maga is an Israeli self-defense system that I was introduced to in 2006 by my girlfriend Gail at a martial arts studio in Minneapolis. I became an instructor in 2008 and started teaching alongside Gail. Founding Krav Maga Minneapolis and helping others learn to defend themselves has been one of my proudest accomplishments.

explicit_text: Gail and I represent the International Krav Maga Federation, or IKMF, where we achieved the rank of Expert 1. This organization has been central to our work teaching Krav Maga in Minneapolis. Being part of IKMF has allowed us to pursue our passion for self-defense and build a business together.
